charset=utf-8"> <meta http-equiv="Pragma" content="no-cache"> <meta http-equiv="cache-control" content="max-age=0, must-revalidate, no-cache, no-store, private"> <meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="post-check=0, pre-check=0"> <meta http-equiv="Expires" content="0"> <title>index</title> <link href="/igrsup/css/style.css" type="text/css" rel="stylesheet"> <link href="/igrsup/css/keyboard.css" type="text/css" rel="stylesheet"> <script type="text/javascript" language="javascript" src="/igrsup/js/jquery-3.7.1.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript" language="javascript" src="/igrsup/js/jquery.uniform.js charset=" utf-8"=""></script> <script type="text/javascript" language="javascript" src="/igrsup/js/prernaUser.js" charset="utf-8"></script> <script type="text/javascript" language="javascript" src="/igrsup/js/keyboard.js" charset="utf-8"></script> <script type="text/javascript" language="javascript"> $(document).ready(function() { function disableBack() { window.history.forward() } window.onload = disableBack(); window.onpageshow = function(evt) { if (evt.persisted) disableBack() } }); window.location.hash=""; window.location.hash="";//for google chrome window.onhashchange=function(){window.location.hash="";} //Prevents backspace except in the case of textareas and text inputs to prevent user navigation. $(document).keydown(function (e) { var preventKeyPress; if (e.keyCode == 8) { var d = e.srcElement || e.target; switch (d.tagName.toUpperCase()) { case 'TEXTAREA': preventKeyPress = d.readOnly || d.disabled; break; case 'INPUT': preventKeyPress = d.readOnly || d.disabled || (d.attributes["type"] && $.inArray(d.attributes["type"].value.toLowerCase(), ["radio", "checkbox", "submit", "button"]) >= 0); break; case 'DIV': preventKeyPress = d.readOnly || d.disabled || !(d.attributes["contentEditable"] && d.attributes["contentEditable"].value == "true"); break; default: preventKeyPress = true; break; } } else preventKeyPress = false; if (preventKeyPress) e.preventDefault(); }); </script> </head> <body> <center> <div class="wrapper"> <script type="text/javascript" language="javascript" src="/igrsup/js/sessionListner.js"></script> <script type="text/javascript"> window.onload = getSessionTimeOut(); </script> <st
